name: Zucchini Bread/ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in your bread machine manual.
2. In a large bowl, combine the grated zucchini, water, walnut oil, honey, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Mix in the vital gluten (if using) and whole wheat flour, oat flour, yeast, and chopped walnuts until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased bread pan.
5. Follow the remaining instructions as outlined in your bread machine manual.
6. Bake according to the manual's directions.
7. Allow the bread to cool before serving.
